zh.lifeSummary: 當Gytha Countess of Hereford於1026年出生在英國賀福爾時，她的父親Osgod Clopa21歲，母親Agatha18歲。她於1042年與Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford在英國英格蘭素福爾可艾可寧結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1099年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾素德勒享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gytha Countess of Hereford于1026年出生在英国賀福爾时，她的父亲Osgod Clopa21岁，母亲Agatha18岁。她于1042年与Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford在英国英格兰素福爾可艾可寧结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1099年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾素德勒享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gytha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name, a short form of various compound names formed with gyð ‘strife’. This name was born in the 11th century by the wife of Godwin, Earl of Wessex. It was revived in Victorian times and has been used occasionally since then.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Gytha Countess of Hereford was born in 1026, in Herefordshire, England, her father, Osgod Clopa, was 21 and her mother, Agatha, was 18. She married Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford in 1042, in Exning, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1099, in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gytha Countess of Hereford est née en 1026, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Osgod Clopa, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agatha, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford en 1042, à Exning, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1099, à Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gytha Countess of Hereford 1026 in Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Osgod Clopa 21 und ihre Mutter Agatha 18. Sie hat 1042 in Exning, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1099 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gytha Countess of Hereford è nata il nel 1026 nel Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Osgod Clopa, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Agatha, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford nel 1042, nel Exning, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1099, nel Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gytha Countess of Herefordが1026年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Osgod Clopaは21歳，母Agathaは18歳であった。1042年にイギリスイギリススフォルクエクスニングでRaoul de Mantes, Earl of Herefordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1099年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリーで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gytha Countess of Hereford(이)가 1026년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Osgod Clopa(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1042년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스닝에서 Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1099년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 수데리에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gytha Countess of Hereford nasceu em 1026, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Osgod Clopa, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Agatha, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford em 1042, em Exning, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1099, em Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gytha Countess of Hereford родилась в 1026 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Osgod Clopa было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agatha, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford в 1042 г. в местности экснинг, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1099 г. в местности судели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gytha Countess of Hereford nació en 1026, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Osgod Clopa, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Agatha, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford en 1042, en Exning, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1099, en Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años.
